understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on each level while avoiding dying (e.g., from spikes), using at most 2 attempts per level and 50 turns per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can move one tile (e.g., MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) if not blocked, and after movement the player is affected by the current gravity direction, potentially falling/sliding until supported; CLICK targets specific clickable tiles to remove them from the map, which can open paths or change how gravity moves you, often causing the player to fall immediately through the newly opened space; landing on a spike tile ends the attempt instantly; if an attempt fails the level restarts and you retry (up to 2 attempts); undo was not used in the shown turns but would revert the last action if available.
